hackathon: ETHGlobal HackMoney 2026 - Uniswap Track | $50K+ Prize Pool
description: LiquiAgent deploys as an ERC-4626-compliant vault where an autonomous agent manages liquidity positions on Uniswap V3. Unlike standard LPs, LiquiAgent uses a Circom circuit to generate a ZK proof that the agent has rebalanced within a valid price range without exposing the specific price levels or trade sizes to the public mempool. This prevents MEV bots from front-running the agent's rebalancing actions. The agent operates via a Node.js service that monitors on-chain state, executes trades via
angle: First autonomous LP that proves active range management via ZK without revealing price paths to prevent front-running.
